subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Install a gem into the local repository

args.name: GEMNAME
args.description: Name of the gem to install

options.name: --version
options.description: Specify version of gem to install

options.name: --bindir
options.description: Directory where executables should be located

options.name: --user-install
options.description: Install in user's home directory instead of GEM_HOME

subcommands.name: uninstall
subcommands.description: Uninstall gems from the local repository

args.name: GEMNAME
args.description: Name of the gem to uninstall

options.name: --version
options.description: Specify version of gem to uninstall

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Update installed gems to the latest version

args.name: GEMNAME
args.description: Name of the gem to update (updates all if omitted)

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: Display local gems whose name matches REGEXP

args.name: REGEXP
args.description: Regular expression to match gem names

options.name: --local
options.description: Restrict operations to the LOCAL domain

options.name: --remote
options.description: Restrict operations to the REMOTE domain

options.name: --exact
options.description: Name of gem must match exact string

subcommands.name: search
subcommands.description: Find gems whose name starts with REGEXP

args.name: REGEXP
args.description: Regular expression to match gem names

options.name: --remote
options.description: Restrict operations to the REMOTE domain (default)

subcommands.name: info
subcommands.description: Show information for the given gem

subcommands.name: cleanup
subcommands.description: Clean up old versions of installed gems

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Evaluate cleanup but don't delete anything

globalOptions.name: --verbose
globalOptions.description: Set the verbose level of output

globalOptions.name: --config-file
globalOptions.description: Use this config file instead of default
